reason: Evaluation preparation found that 2025-07-01 had 19 rather than 20 liquidity-qualified targets. The frozen rule explicitly says fewer than 20 makes that decision an all-target NO_ACTION month; the implementation incorrectly escalated it to a whole-stage data-quality failure even though build_panel already skipped that month.
changes: Keep the below-minimum decision and its count in data_quality_evaluation.json.
Do not fail source quality solely because a decision is an all-target NO_ACTION month.
Allow the frozen study.py identity to advance only through this checkpoint-bound amendment chain.
